question: Please provide the workspace secret openviking-root-api-key in Monk so I can deploy and verify the production openviking/stack template.
summary: Generated MANIFEST, monk/openviking-base.yaml, monk/openviking-example.yaml, and monk/openviking-stack.yaml. Analyzer diagnostics have no errors. Local demonstration openviking/stack-local deployed successfully; monk ps shows local/openviking/example alive=true and ready=true, and GET http://127.0.0.1:19380/health returned HTTP 200 with healthy=true and auth_mode=api_key. Production standalone openviking/stack is authored as an ingress-only secure stack and reads its root API key from secret("openviking-root-api-key"); that secret is absent, so a Monk workspace secret request was opened and production deployment/verification is pending human input.
